name: codex-status-pro
description: Monitor Codex token usage and rate limits in real-time

codexStatusPro.provider.description: Which coding assistant to monitor. auto: detect from local session directories.

codexStatusPro.displayMode.description: Status bar display mode. percent: show percentage with mini bar. absolute: show used/limit count.

codexStatusPro.language.description: Display language. auto: follow VS Code locale. en: English. zh-CN: Simplified Chinese.

codexStatusPro.statusBar.alignment.description: Status bar alignment. left: aligned to the left side of the status bar. right: aligned to the right side.

codexStatusPro.updateAnimationDurationMs.description: Duration of the moon update animation in milliseconds. Range: 500–10000. When new data arrives during animation, the timer resets.

codexStatusPro.updateAnimationIntervalMs.description: Frame interval of the moon update animation in milliseconds. Range: 100–2000. Controls how fast the moon phases cycle.

codexStatusPro.statusBar.utilizationColo.description: Status bar text color when utilization is below 20%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 20%–40%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 40%–60%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 60%–80%. Hex color string.
Status bar text color when utilization is 80% or above. Hex color string.

codexStatusPro.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: API refresh interval in seconds. Range: 30–∞. Long tick fetches quota from API.

codexStatusPro.shortRefreshIntervalSecon.description: Local estimation refresh interval in seconds. Range: 1–60. Short tick reads local JSONL and estimates usage without API call.

codexStatusPro.dataRetentionDays.description: Local usage data retention period in days. Range: 30–3650. Older entries are discarded during scan.

codexStatusPro.weeklyBudget.description: Weekly budget in configured currency. 0 means disabled. When cost7d exceeds this value, a warning is shown.

codexStatusPro.heatmapDays.description: Number of days to show in the usage history heatmap.

codexStatusPro.heatmapCycles5h.description: Number of 5h cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

codexStatusPro.heatmapCycles7d.description: Number of 7d cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

codexStatusPro.heatmapCycles30d.description: Number of 30d cycles to display in the heatmap. Range: 1–60.

codexStatusPro.costCurveMaxPoints.description: Maximum number of data points for the cost curve. Range: 200–20000.

codexStatusPro.chartHeightRatio.description: Height ratio for dashboard charts (canvas height = width * ratio).

codexStatusPro.currency.description: Currency for cost display. auto: infer from provider (Codex/Claude/Cursor → USD, Kimi/GLM → CNY). USD: US Dollar. CNY: Chinese Yuan.

codexStatusPro.pricing.models.gpt5.input.description: gpt-5 input token price per million (USD).

codexStatusPro.pricing.models.gpt5.outpu.description: gpt-5 output token price per million (USD).

codexStatusPro.pricing.models.gpt5.cache.description: gpt-5 cache-read token price per million (USD).
gpt-5 cache-write token price per million (USD).

codexStatusPro.pricing.models.claudeOpus.description: Claude Opus input token price per million (USD).
Claude Opus output token price per million (USD).
Claude Opus cache-read token price per million (USD).
Claude Opus cache-write token price per million (USD).

codexStatusPro.pricing.models.claudeSonn.description: Claude Sonnet input token price per million (USD).
Claude Sonnet output token price per million (USD).
Claude Sonnet cache-read token price per million (USD).
Claude Sonnet cache-write token price per million (USD).

codexStatusPro.pricing.models.claudeHaik.description: Claude Haiku input token price per million (USD).
Claude Haiku output token price per million (USD).
Claude Haiku cache-read token price per million (USD).
Claude Haiku cache-write token price per million (USD).

codexStatusPro.pricing.kimi.models.k2_6..description: Kimi k2.6 input token price per million (CNY).
Kimi k2.6 output token price per million (CNY).
Kimi k2.6 cache-read token price per million (CNY).
Kimi k2.6 cache-write token price per million (CNY).

codexStatusPro.pricing.officialUrl.description: Custom official pricing page URL shown in Dashboard. Leave empty to use provider default.

codexStatusPro.pricing.officialDate.description: Pricing publish date displayed next to the official pricing link (YYYY-MM-DD).

codexStatusPro.defaultModelName.description: Default model name displayed when usage entry has no model information.

codexStatusPro._pauseSignal.description: Internal: pause state broadcast signal (timestamp). Do not modify manually.
